---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. (Not the solution yet — the problem.)

**Proposed solution**
What would you like to see happen? A new flag, a change in behavior, a new output format, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about, and why they didn't fit.

**Additional context**
Anything else worth knowing — links, examples from other tools, etc.
